summary.intent: Create a PR for GitHub header links feature and clean up any leftover changes on main.
summary.outcome: PR #806 created at https://github.com/moltis-org/moltis/pull/806 for feat/github-header-links; a Tailwind rebuild artifact (style.css) was committed and pushed to main.

repo: The Tailwind build script outputs to css/style.css, but there is a legacy style.css path at crates/web/src/assets/style.css that can receive stale regeneration artifacts.
moltis-web is a Cargo workspace package checkable with `cargo check -p moltis-web`.

code.finding: Legacy Tailwind output path; receives stray utility classes (e.g. .text-[.7rem]) when the build runs, separate from the canonical css/style.css output.

workflow: Background cargo check tasks can be dispatched during PR creation and verified after the fact.
git worktree can be used to inspect a feature branch without switching: `git worktree add ../moltis-gh-links feat/github-header-links`.

friction: Tailwind build output path mismatch caused a stray style.css diff on main, requiring a manual decision on whether to commit or discard it.
open_items: The dual Tailwind output paths (css/style.css vs crates/web/src/assets/style.css) should be reconciled to prevent future stray artifacts on main.
